poam-items.title: KSI Gap: Endpoint compliance via Intune
poam-items.description: Continuous endpoint compliance validation and automated remediation via Microsoft Intune, enforcing configuration baselines, patch currency, and device health attestation for all managed endpoints.
poam-items.remarks: Auto-generated from canon on 2026-03-22 | Severity: high | Controls: CM-2, CM-6 | Remediation: Implement KSI-ENDPOINT-COMPLIANCE to achieve FedRAMP 20x KSI compliance | Source: ksi_mappings

poam-items.title: KSI Gap: Data loss prevention and encryption
poam-items.description: Data at rest and in transit encryption enforcement combined with data loss prevention policies to protect sensitive federal information across all UIAO system boundaries.
poam-items.remarks: Auto-generated from canon on 2026-03-22 | Severity: medium | Controls: SC-28, SC-13 | Remediation: Implement KSI-DATA-PROTECTION to achieve FedRAMP 20x KSI compliance | Source: ksi_mappings
